mapper.insert:
insert into test_item_original_record_template_rel
id,
check_item_id,
original_record_template_id,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{checkItemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{originalRecordTemplateId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update test_item_original_record_template_rel
check_item_id = #{checkItemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
original_record_template_id = #{originalRecordTemplateId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.* FROM test_original_record_template AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_item_original_record_template_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.original_record_template_id WHERE t2.check_item_id = #{checkItemId}
